Rope'em

Rope’em is a combination of a peer rope and a rope jam. Facilitators can choose to organize rope related workshops/skill-shares during Rope’em. All rope related workshops organized by BigFatPervs and facilitated by PurpleRyu are suited for all combinations of couples, trios, self tie-ers and more. To find out when PlayHouse is facilitating a rope workshop/skillshare please check our events. It depends on the facilitators and participants what space is set up for which activities.

A Peer Rope

An event in which peers come together, in this case around rope, to socialize, meet new people and just have fun in and out of bondage.

A Rope Jam

An event in which there is more emphasis on learning new things and trying new things out. Showing what you can do and figuring out the things that you would like to improve upon.

Note

If you are planning to tie without a spotter outside a workshop, it is advised to bring your own ropes and safety scissors. If you can’t bring rope or safety scissors, we have a limited amount available to borrow during “Rope’em”. Buying these from PlayHouse is also possible. Scissors are 5e and 2 x 8m Hempex rope is 15e.

Suspension point

At the moment we do not have a rated suspension point. There is one DIY suspension option available, but you will have to organize with the Big Fat Pervy rope facilitator if it is accessible during PlayHouse.

If you would like to collaborate or contribute, please contact us by e-mail bigfatpervs@riseup.net If you have any rope related questions, please ask the rope facilitator about this.
